## What FinTech teams ask us most.

### How does Iterable ensure security for high-stakes fintech communications? +

Iterable is a secure customer data platform built for regulated environments, with SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliance. Our cloud-native architecture supports high-volume message sending with enterprise-grade data security, ensuring that sensitive financial communications are delivered reliably and in compliance with global standards like GDPR and CCPA.

### Can we use our existing Snowflake or BigQuery data without manual uploads? +

Yes. Iterable supports zero-copy architecture and reverse ETL compatibility, through native cloud data warehouse integration, allowing you to activate your data directly from Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks without duplicating sensitive financial records. This open & flexible approach means your campaigns are always powered by real-time user profiles without the friction of manual uploads on stale CSV files.

### How does explainable AI help fintech marketers maintain brand control? +

Unlike black-box systems, Iterable uses explainable AI (XAI) to provide transparent decisioning you can trust. Our AI acts as a reasoning engine—orchestrating a range of marketing agents that evaluate customer behavior and determine the next best action within human-in-the-loop guardrails you define. This gives you full visibility into why every decision is made, ensuring every message aligns with your brand and regulatory requirements.

### Does Iterable support real-time behavioral triggers for fraud alerts or balance updates?+

Absolutely. Our platform is engineered for real-time data ingestion, allowing you to trigger messages the millisecond a customer interacts with your brand. Whether sending fraud alerts, balance updates, or onboarding nudges, you can adapt customer journeys instantly with relevant, cross-channel messaging that keeps customers informed and engaged during critical financial moments.
